name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inconsistent billing causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated bill extraction and variance alerts instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and managing utility expenses across multiple properties.
features: manual entry for utility bill details

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking and managing utility expenses across multiple properties.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inconsistent billing causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated bill extraction and variance alerts instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of utility bills in spreadsheets
must_have_features: manual entry for utility bill details
